query: I'm starting a fresh project to train a fraud-detection classifier on tabular financial data. Empty directory. Set me up.
expected_behavior: Does NOT run the security-research scaffold (SECURITY.md / VDP / threat-model) as the primary scaffold for an ML classifier project
Identifies that this is an ML / data-science project, not a security-research project, and hands off (or routes) to scaffolding-ml-research-notebook as the right scaffold
Optionally notes that some security-adjacent artifacts may be added later if the project enters production and needs them, but does not run the security scaffold blindly
